gaps.issue: Body text at 0.9375rem (15px), below WCAG AA minimum of 16px (1rem). Design-2 proposed 1rem but developer failed before implementing.
Tool text at 0.85rem (13.6px), below the 14px (0.875rem) target for secondary UI elements.
Line-height at 1.65 is too loose for Notion-style density. Design-2 proposed 1.6 for tighter, more professional feel.
Tool container margin-top still 0.75rem (12px), not on 8px grid. Should be 1rem (16px) per design-2.
Status bar margin-top and padding-top still 0.75rem (12px), should be 1rem (16px) for 8px grid consistency.
User and assistant messages have identical transparent backgrounds. Notion differentiates user input visually. Consider subtle background for user messages.
No timestamps visible on messages. Conversation context requires temporal anchoring for real conversation feel.
Code block dark theme (#0d1117) may clash with light UI context. Consider lighter code background or theme-aware code blocks.
Transition durations inconsistent: 0.15s (message-card bg), 0.2s (most elements), 0.3s (tool expand/icon). Should standardize on 2-3 tiers.
Mixed font size units: rem for most, px for avatar font-size. Should use consistent units.

implementationStatus.note: Developer for iteration 2 failed (API error 500). Some design-2 proposals were already present from iteration 1 commit (d2f5927): message padding 1rem 1.5rem, margin-bottom 0.5rem, role label 0.8125rem/500 weight, avatar 13px consistency, subtle hover/border. Remaining: body text size, tool text size, line-height, tool container margin, status bar margin.
